lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Amelia
lines.text: Hello. Do you need something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope. Just thought I'd say hi.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. Have you heard of Camorra?

lines.speaker: Amelia
lines.text: I'm sure we've already spoken about this.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: We probably have. I'm very forgetful.

lines.speaker: Amelia
lines.text: The most likely place to find answers is the Shayzien Crypts. You'll find the entrance in the Graveyard of Heroes, south of our chapel. Be careful, it's filled with zombies.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. Have you heard of Camorra?

lines.speaker: Amelia
lines.text: Not that I remember.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well she was a great hero during the Dragonkin Conflicts. I think she travelled to Kourend before the war ended. I'm trying to find out more about her.

lines.speaker: Amelia
lines.text: Well Shayzien was founded by those fleeing the Dragonkin Conflicts. And the city has never been short of heroes. There's a good chance she was from Shayzien.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But you've never heard of her?

lines.speaker: Amelia
lines.text: No but that's not surprising. Most of our history was lost during Xeric's reign. There is somewhere you might find answers though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where's that?

lines.speaker: Amelia
lines.text: The Shayzien Crypts. They were built before the kingdom even existed. Some of the oldest Shayzien heroes are buried there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let me guess. There's a catch isn't there?

lines.speaker: Amelia
lines.text: I'm afraid so. For hundreds of years, the crypts have been overrun by the dead. We've tried clearing them out but they just come back again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well thankfully I'm afraid of no ghost. Where do I start?

lines.speaker: Amelia
lines.text: They're zombies, not ghosts. You'll find the entrance to the crypts in the Graveyard of Heroes, south of our chapel. Be careful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you for the help.
